title: Fix MongoDB Projection to Ignore Nested Fields with Optional Keys

statement.outputFormat: A projected document object with the specified fields
statement.notes: The projection should ignore any nested fields with optional keys (e.g. "address_optional")

constraints.description: Number of documents in the collection

examples.explanation: The projection ignores the optional fields in the address object
The projection ignores the optional fields in the address object

hints.text: Use the $elemMatch operator to ignore fields with optional keys
